instruction: Extract the person's name, age, and city from: 'Maria, 34, lives in Lisbon.' Respond only with JSON.
From 'The order #4471 shipped on 2023-08-02 to Berlin', extract order_id, ship_date, and destination as JSON.
Classify the sentiment of 'I absolutely loved the new update!' and give a confidence. Return JSON with fields sentiment and confidence.
Parse 'iPhone 15 Pro, $999, in stock' into product, price, and available. Respond only with JSON.
Extract the flight number, departure, and arrival from 'Flight AA122 departs JFK arrives LAX'. Return JSON.
From 'Temperature is 21 degrees with humidity at 60 percent', extract temperature_c and humidity_pct as JSON integers.
Extract the book title, author, and number of pages from 'Dune by Frank Herbert, 412 pages'. Respond only with JSON.
Parse the meeting 'Standup at 09:30 in Room B with 5 attendees' into time, location, attendees. Return JSON.
From 'User alice@example.com signed up on 2024-01-15 as a premium member', extract email, signup_date, tier. Respond only with JSON.
Extract the recipe name, servings, and whether it is vegetarian from 'Mushroom Risotto, serves 4, vegetarian'. Return JSON.
